media_legacy_video_recheck_idx.name: media_legacy_video_recheck_idx
media_legacy_video_recheck_idx.where: "media"."media_type" = 'video' AND "media"."duration_seconds" IS NULL AND "media"."duration_unverifiable_reason" IS NULL

wallet_wd_notify_attempts_open_admin_ale.name: wallet_wd_notify_attempts_open_admin_alert_idx
wallet_wd_notify_attempts_open_admin_ale.where: "wallet_withdrawal_notify_attempts"."admin_exhaustion_notified_at" IS NOT NULL AND "wallet_withdrawal_notify_attempts"."admin_followup_acknowledged_at" IS NULL

public.eclectic_scores_view.definition: select "tournament_id", "player_id", "hole_number", MIN("strokes") as "best_strokes" from "scores" group by "scores"."tournament_id", "scores"."player_id", "scores"."hole_number"
public.eclectic_scores_view.name: eclectic_scores_view
